title: Secure first confirmed adopting beneficiary
context: The Elyos definition of shipped requires that explainers be adopted and used by a named beneficiary — verifiedNeed: false is the current portfolio-wide status until a training program, education committee, journal-club network, OER repository, or advocacy organization confirms it will adopt/teach from the explainers. This task follows the outreach work in outreach-008 and aims to convert an outreach thread into a named, confirmed adoption commitment. Once a beneficiary confirms adoption, all tasks for the adopted explainer set should have requestor set and verifiedNeed updated to true.
objective: Secure a documented adoption commitment from a named training program, education committee, journal-club network, OER repository, or advocacy organization that confirms it will adopt and use the stats-for-clinicians explainers, and update the relevant task records to reflect verifiedNeed: true and a named requestor.
acceptanceCriteria: A named training program, education committee, journal-club network, OER repository, or advocacy organization has confirmed in writing (email, issue comment, or equivalent documented exchange) that it will adopt and use the explainers.
The adoption mechanism is documented: how the explainers will be used (curriculum embed / journal-club kit / OER repository acceptance / advocacy training module / other).

An adoption evidence artifact (e.g. outcomes/<release-id>.json or an equivalent committed document) records: the beneficiary name, type, the adopted explainer set, the adoption mechanism, the date confirmed, and a link to the confirmation evidence.
The relevant task JSON files for the adopted explainer set are updated (or a PR is opened) to set verifiedNeed: true and requestor to the confirmed beneficiary name.
The steward has reviewed and committed the adoption evidence artifact.

If a formal partner cannot be secured in M1, a self-serve adoption by a verifiable third party (e.g. an educator who publishes a syllabus embedding the CC-BY explainer) is documented as an alternative path, and the evidence is recorded.
resources: PLAN.md — Problem & beneficiaries; Definition of Shipped; Success metrics
Elyos good-deed definition: verifiedNeed and delivered bar
output: A committed adoption evidence artifact documenting a named beneficiary's confirmed adoption of the explainer set, plus updated task files setting verifiedNeed: true and requestor for the adopted tasks. Unlocks M1 definition of done.
